characters.name: Abraham
characters.description: AbrahamwasGazpacho's pet fish. He died for unknown reasons or maybe because of his mother. He was talked about in "Chowder's Babysitter."

characters.name: Acid-Spitting Bug
characters.description: The acid bug comes from aNofruitthat is whacked at precisely the wrong time.  It is pink as a female and dark blue as a male. They have beady eyes, horns, and six to ten legs. They also have a huge mouth with a tiny throat.

characters.name: Agubi
characters.description: AgubiCharacteristicsGenderMaleSpeciesVegetable humanoidStatusOccupationVeggie GuruThe veggie guru appeared inThe Garden. He grew through the combined efforts of Mungs gentle efforts and Truffles loud Voice. He helped by tellingChowderall about how plants grow in a song. Showing Chowder that for anything to grow it takes both a gentle touch and a firm hand. He has an Indian accent.

characters.name: Alligator House
characters.description: Alligator HouseCharacteristicsGenderMaleSpeciesAlligatorMediaVoice ActorJim Cummings TheAlligator Houseis a house thatKimchi's family andPorridgelive in. You enter through his mouth, and his inside is way bigger than it looks from the outside. He is an alligator, but everyone mistakes him for a crocodile. Apparently, he takes this very offensively, because when someone called him a crocodile for the last time, he kicks everyone out and tells them to go find the crocodile they want so bad. It can be assumed by this that there are crocodile houses too. He only appears inMy Big Fat Stinky Wedding. Voiced by Jim Cummings, the current voice of Winnie the Pooh. He breaks the 4th wall when no one's around. Judging from how he feels around Chowder he gets annoyed with his questions. He is obedient as he refused to let Chowder in under Porridge's order, Somehow he was able to regurgitate Chowder, Kimchi and his family out of his chest.

characters.name: Ambrosia
characters.description: AmbrosiaCharacteristicsGenderFemaleSpeciesCat-rabbit hybridStatusOccupationBakingapprenticeAffiliationsPanini(master)MediaFirst Appearance"Chowder Grows Up"Voice ActorMary Matilyn MouserReal-life CounterpartAmbrosia (Greek dish)/Ambrosia (apple) Ambrosiais a bakingapprenticein the "Chowder Grows Up" special who works under the teachings ofPaniniat Panini's Muffins. In that episode, becauseChowderrefused to grow up, Panini never married Chowder which led to Ambrosia often being abused by her by being forcibly infantilized. This was to help Panini cope with the lack of Chowder and any children in her life. She is a green-furredcat-bear-rabbitwith a single, rabbit-like ear that stands up. As well, she has the signature striped-tail as seen on all other kinds of her species and has a hot pink, triangular nose, similar to Panini's. She also has more rounded cheeks like Chowder and has sapphire eyes.

characters.name: Ancho
characters.description: alignrightAnchoAffiliationsPepper Spray Saleswoman(girlfriend)SpeciesDogFirst Appearance"Shnitzel Makes a Deposit"Voice actorPhil Lamarr Anchois a character that appeared inShnitzel Makes a DepositandChowder Loses His Hat. And a cameo onHands On a Big Mixer. It is possible that Ancho was named after the ancho pepper, or the sauce of the same name. Or maybe is a nickname for anchovy. Ancho is very shy when it comes to girls but he is easily angered when someone makes fun of his tie-shaped deformity. It was revealed in the episode "Chowder Loses His Hat" that he has crush on thePepper Spray Saleswoman.
characters.personality_section: Ancho is very shy when it comes to girls but he is easily angered when someone makes fun of his tie-shaped deformity. It was revealed in the episode "Chowder Loses His Hat" that he has crush on thePepper Spray Saleswoman.

characters.name: Apple People
characters.description: TheApple Peopleonly appeared in the episode "Paint the Town." They live inChowder Land. Chowder ate the male apple's head which scared his wife. When everyone wanted Chowder to draw something, the male apple asked for a new head.

characters.name: Arbor
characters.description: ArborCharacteristicsGenderMaleSpeciesArborianStatusRelativesArbor's FamilyOccupationOwner of ArboritumAffiliationsMung Daal(former host)Ms. Endive(former host)MediaFirst Appearance"The Arborians"Last Appearance"Gazpacho!"Voice ActorRon Perlman Ms. Endive(former host) "I am Arbor, proud Arborian male tree."-Arbor

characters.name: Arbor's Family
characters.description: Arbor's family is shown inThe Arborians. No matter how distant the relative (for example, Arbor's wife's brother's cousin),Arborseems to know them. Every member of Arbor's famly-and probably every Arborian- has a name that is a variation of Arbor (Arbor, Arbora, Arboria, Arbor Jr., Arbor Jr. Jr., Arbie). Arbor- The most known Arborian in Chowder. Arbor has green leaves.

characters.name: Arborians
characters.description: alignrightArboriansSpeciesArborian TreeFirst Appearance"The Arborians"Last Appearance"Gazpacho!" "Eh, cut everything. We need more marble columns, more tigers with lightning bolts, more chocolate-filled furniture, all with surround-sound system." - Arbor. Arborians are extremely picky and demanding, only giving syrup to those who fulfill their desires. They have an affinity for marble columns and tiger statues with lightning bolts, which they consider a requirement for their living spaces. They are deceitful, as seen in "The Arborians" when they lockMungin a broom closet after telling him that he will be rewarded with syrup for entering. They are also exploitative and useMung's desire to get their syrup in order to be catered for without any clear intentions of providing any.

characters.name: Baby Army
characters.description: ChowderGot a baby army in the episode "Old Man Thyme."These babies were supposed to attack Old Man Thyme and his paper weight shop. Instead,the babies started attackingMarzipan City.They even attackedC.H. Greenblatt. After that Old Man Thyme called 911 on Chowder.(For the third time.)When Chowder got out of jail the babies were still attacking the city.In the end it shown Marzipan City being carried by Atlas.Then a giant baby landed on the city and was even heavy for Atlas to carry.

characters.name: Baby Minotaur
characters.description: Oh, for the love of might! Make it stop! It's disgusting! The Baby MinotaurOtherwise known as Baby MinotaurAliasesBaby MinotaurCharacteristicsGenderUnknownAgeUnder a daySpeciesUnknown, presumably minotaurStatusRelativesJeffrey (father)OccupationBeing funnyAffiliationsJeffreyMediaFirst AppearanceEpisode 28, The Deadly MazeLast AppearanceEpisode 28, The Deadly MazeVoice ActorUnknownReal-life CounterpartNot in real life (I wish) The Baby Minotauris a small, pink, obese pig-like minotaur with hooves for hands and feet that hatches from an egg. It is the only character in the entire show made in CGI.

characters.name: Backwards
characters.description: Backwardsis a seemingly homeless person who dresses like a superhero. He lives in theOther Side of Marzipan.He appears to be easily amused, but seems to have anger issues as well, and speaks another language- which, as his name implies, is simply English backwards. This can easily be translated by simply reversing the episode, though subtitles are provided. He is a very good friend of a creature calledCan. In his first appearance he was seen making fun ofMung Daal. Offended, Mung tried to stand up for himself, but he inadvertently knocked Can to the ground, revealing that what Mung had originally perceived to be a soda can was actually a living entity who had been friends with Backwards since childhood. Enraged, Backwards then proceeded to beat up Mung. Backwards is voiced by C.H. Greenblatt, who created the show.

characters.name: Barking Spiders
characters.description: Barking SpidersCharacteristicsSpeciesSpidersMediaFirst AppearanceThe Thousand Pound Cake Barking Spidersare the size of a child and bark like dogs. They seem to attack anyone who has food.ChowderandShnitzelran away from them inThe Thousand Pound Cake.

characters.name: Baron VonBon-Bon
characters.description: Baron vonbon-bon Baron VonBon-Bonis a character in a murder mystery play. His name is a parody of a bon-bon. Baron VonBon-Bon was a character in a murder mystery play, where he murdered Miss Sweety Pie and Sherlock Honeycombs investigated the murder. Baron VonBon-Bon was a character in a murder mystery play, where he murdered Miss Sweety Pie and Sherlock Honeycombs investigated the murder.

characters.name: Bernaise
characters.description: Bernaiseis an unseen character. He  was known to lift theLead Farfel. Bernaise is a name for a sauce.

characters.name: Big Ball Monster
characters.description: Game Over- Big Ball Monster  The Big Ball Monster is a Minor Character from The EpisodeBig Ball. He is seen lifting the stadium and throwing it into a giant rubbish bin and he only has 1 line (See Above) He looks like Bowser from Mario.

characters.name: Big Food (character)
characters.description: Big FoodCharacteristicsGenderFemaleSpeciesFood-based BigfootStatusOccupationActress (formerly)MediaVoice ActorCandi Milo Big Foodis a being made of food. Her first and only appearance was inthe episode of the same name. Initially assumed to be some kind of Bigfoot-like creature that only exists in people's imaginations (and trashy tabloids), it's eventually revealed that Big Food's actually a washed-up actress who has long since faded from the public eye -- now living life as a recluse, she tries reliving her glory days as an actress by watching her old movies while occasionally stealing food from campers (like Chowder, Mung and Shnitzel) in order to get by.

characters.name: Big Toe
characters.description: Chowder'sBig Toefirst appeared in "The Big Hat Biddies." He never trusts anyone. When Mr. Hand (or Chowder's hand) said, "Who are you going to trust,Mung, your wise cooking master or your hand?" Chowder was about to say something but then The Big Toe came up and said, "Oh, why trust him?!"  Then Chowder said, "Whoah, Big Toe dosn't trust anyone."

characters.name: Big-nosed Chowder
characters.description: Big-nosed ChowderCharacteristicsGenderMaleSpeciesHuman-cat-bear-rabbit hybridStatusAffiliationsChowder(lookalike)MediaFirst Appearance"The Catch Phrase"Last Appearance"The Catch Phrase" TheBig Nosed Chowderis a very minor character that only appeared in "The Catch Phrase." He is yet another lookalike ofChowder. It's also the first person thatMungthought was the real Chowder. That chowder is more mature looking than Chowder. He looks up at Mung and snarls at him before Mung shoves him away. That is the last appearance of Big Nosed Chowder is a Nose humans.

characters.name: Bluenana
characters.description:
Chowder holding a bluenana as a phone ABluenanaand/or the character Bluenana only appeared in the episode "The Bruised Bluenana." The real food or/and the take off of this food is aBananathat is painted blue. When Chowder accidentally bruised the Bluenana, its mother was angered and scolded Chowder and Panini.
For some reason the Bluenana is not just a food, but also acts like a cordless telephone. Panini was able to call Chowder through the bluenana. This could, however, just be a gag referring to the fact that Chowder pretended to talk into it like a phone (to get Panini to leave, obviously) only a minute ago.

characters.name: Bluenana's mother
characters.description: Bluenana's motherCharacteristicsGenderFemaleSpeciesBluenanaMediaFirst Appearance"The Bruised Bluenana"Bluenana's mother is the mother of theBluenanathatPaninithought wasChowderand hers baby. when she first appeared Chowder and Panini made the baby bluenana sick and the bluenana's mother had a heart attack.

characters.description: Bluenana's motherCharacteristicsGenderFemaleSpeciesBluenanaMediaFirst Appearance"The Bruised Bluenana"Bluenana's mother is the mother of theBluenanathatPaninithought wasChowderand hers baby. when she first appeared Chowder and Panini made the baby bluenana sick and the bluenana's mother had a heart attack.

characters.name: Bone
characters.description: Boneis a minorChowdercharacter. He is a blue fish with indigo hair and is a member of the Apprentice Scouts. He was first seen in "The Apprentice Scouts" due to be nameless and no speaking role. Bone later appeared in "The Birthday Suits" showing to be playing ball with the others. Other times he made cameos in "Rise and Fall of Chowder and Shnitzel" and "A Little Bit of Pizzazz!."

characters.name: Bowser
characters.description: Bowseris a very minor character that only appeared in the end ofBig Ball. He lifts the stadium and he throws it away. His only line is "Game Over." (This is why nobody ends the big ball game).

characters.name: Broccoli Monster
characters.description: TheBroccoli Monsteris a dish that has the body of a blob and has broccoli arms including on the head. It's known toChowderthat it's delicous and has a little kick of hot sauce. The hot sauce is only used only a little on the dish but not that much because it will breath fire on anyone who eats it. The only way to make it calm down and relax is if it drinks or gets a cold breeze, it can then be eaten. This dish was seen around inShnitzel Quits.

characters.name: Bubbles' Head
characters.description: Bubbles' Headis a very minor character that only appeared in "The Heist." Her only line is "Wow! That's sweet." Her clothes are usually seen in the Powerpuff girls, she has two black stripes and on blue on her clothes, she also is a superhero in the Powerpuff girls, she is much more friendlier than her two siblings, Blossom and Buttercup. If you want to see moreclick here.

characters.name: Buck Tooth Weirdo
characters.description: TheBuck Tooth Weirdofirst appeared in the episode "The Blackout." He's one of the weirdos. He's friends with Mike who is reallyChowder,Gazpacho, andGorgonzolain a costume. When the costume blew up Buck Tooth Weirdo was mad and wanted to see Gazpacho's I.D.. He thought it was okay until he saw the part that said it expired 6 minutes ago. He says it was so long sense he seen Mike.

characters.name: Bunnycat
characters.description: Unnamed Bunny/CatCharacteristicsGenderUnspecifiedSpeciesCat-bear-rabbit hybridMediaFirst Appearance"At Your Service"Last Appearance"The BLT's"Voice ActorMindy Sterling Thisunnamedbunnycatis a character that only very briefly appeared in "At Your Service". It is, evidently, a mix between a cat and a rabbit, exhibiting features from both species. In "At Your Service," it appeared whenMs. Endivenamed "the bunny/cat kid" in reference to Chowder, but mistakenly thought to be referring to the unnamed bunny-cat child instead. It looks very similar to Chowder, being fat, having light violet fur, and a pointed purple cap, only the hat lacks a shirt and its hat only has one point. Additionally, the bunny/cat's ears poke out from the hat, and rather than a single sharp tooth sticking from its upper lip, it has a rabbit's buck teeth.

characters.name: C. H. Greenblatt
characters.description: C. H. GreenblattCharacteristicsGenderMaleSpeciesHumanStatusOccupationWriter, storyboard artist, voice actorMediaVoice ActorHimselfCharles "Carl" Harvey Greenblatt(born June 17, 1972) is an American cartoonwriterandstoryboard artist. He has worked on the hit TV seriesSpongeBob SquarePantsand on theCartoon Network's seriesThe Grim Adventures of Billy & MandyandEvil Con Carne. In November 2007, Greenblatt beganChowder, an animated show that he created and executive produced forCartoon Network. Greenblatt collaborated withMaxwell Atomson his newBilly & Mandyspin-offHalloweenspecial calledUnderfist. Greenblatt reprised his role as Fred Fredburger in the collaboration. He's occasionally appeared on the show as a puppet.

characters.name: Can
characters.description: Canis a friend ofBackwards, who has known him since he was a kid. Backwards thought he died whenMung Daalknocked Can to the ground, although Can gets up, saying he's alright, and hops away, but even so Backwards swears vengeance on Mung. AfterwardsMung DaalandChowder, were being chased by Backwards and his gang to pay anyways. The Can is voiced by John DiMaggio.

characters.name: Capellini
characters.description: CapelliniCharacteristicsGenderMaleMediaFirst Appearance"The Thousand Pound Cake"Last Appearance"The Thousand Pound Cake"Real-life CounterpartCapellini (alternate name for Angel Hair Pasta) Capellinionly appears as the main antagonist in "The Thousand Pound Cake", and only his eyes and arms are seen. He lives in a windmill on top of agiant'shead, and always gets free food because nobody ever succeeds in delivering it by sundown. Capellini also never shares his food, much to the giant's dismay.
